name: Pulling The Strings
official_rules_text: As a Card action, a unit with the Pulling the Strings keyword may choose another allied Trooper unit within 2. The chosen unit may make a free Attack action or a free Move action.
description: As a Card action, a unit with the Pulling the Strings keyword may choose another allied Trooper unit within 2. The chosen unit may make a free Attack action or a free Move action.
